title: Adelaide Academic Excellence Scholarship
manual_review_requirements: Confirm that the applicant is an international student under Adelaide University's current definition.
Confirm that the intended CRICOS-registered bachelor's or master's degree satisfies the stated minimum duration after any credit or recognised prior learning.
Confirm that the intended degree is not one of the excluded programmes listed on the official scholarship page.
Confirm that the applicant is not an Australia Awards recipient.
Confirm that the applicant does not hold an international sponsorship tuition-fee waiver equal to or greater than the scholarship value.
Confirm selection by the scholarship panel because the award is competitive and places are limited.
eligibility_text: Adelaide University's Adelaide Academic Excellence Scholarship provides a 50% tuition fee reduction for commencing international students applying to qualifying CRICOS-registered bachelor or master coursework degrees. Applicants using GPA for assessment require a minimum overall GPA of 6.7 on a 7.0 scale or a comparable result. The official page excludes specified programmes, Australia Awards recipients, and certain sponsored students. Semester 2 2026 applications closed on 22 May 2026.

title: Allan and Nesta Ferguson Charitable Trust Masters Scholarships
manual_review_requirements: Verify that the applicant's country appears on the official eligible-countries list.
Confirm that the applicant held an offer for an eligible University of Sheffield course by 8 May 2026.
Confirm overseas tuition-fee status.
Confirm that the applicant does not already hold an equivalent or higher-level qualification.
Confirm compliance with the official previous-study restriction.
Confirm that the applicant was shortlisted and invited to submit the scholarship application.
Confirm competitive selection based on academic strength, rationale, work experience and future ambitions.
eligibility_text: The University of Sheffield and the Allan and Nesta Ferguson Charitable Trust offered three scholarships for eligible developing-country students on specified master's courses in 2026. Each award provided a full tuition fee waiver and a GBP 12,500 maintenance stipend. Applicants needed an eligible course offer, overseas fee status and successful competitive selection. The invited application deadline was 1 June 2026.

title: ANU PhD Scholarship
manual_review_requirements: Confirm admission or a complete application for admission to an ANU PhD or Professional Doctorate by Research programme.
Verify that the applicant's previous qualification satisfies the stated first-class honours, research master's or recognised-equivalent requirement.
Confirm the applicable international, domestic or later scholarship-round deadline for the intended commencement.
Confirm that all supporting documents and referee reports were complete when the admission application was submitted.
Confirm competitive selection based on academic merit and the relevant ANU college ranking process.
Verify tuition-fee liability and any separate tuition scholarship because the inspected page explicitly describes a stipend and allowances but not a universal tuition-fee waiver.
eligibility_text: The ANU PhD Scholarship supports domestic and international postgraduate research students across all fields of study. The official page lists a 2026 base stipend of AUD 39,069 per year, paid fortnightly for 3.5 years, with additional allowances. Applicants must apply for admission to an ANU PhD or Professional Doctorate by Research and normally hold first-class honours, a research master's qualification or a recognised equivalent. Scholarship round deadlines vary by applicant category and intended commencement.

title: ETH Excellence Scholarship and Opportunity Programme
manual_review_requirements: Confirm application to an eligible ETH Zurich master's programme.
Verify that the applicant's bachelor results place them approximately in the top 10 percent of their programme.
Verify all required academic and programme-specific application documents.
Confirm that the intended master's programme lasts three or four semesters.
Confirm final competitive selection by ETH Zurich.
eligibility_text: ETH Zurich's Excellence Scholarship and Opportunity Programme supports outstanding master's students with full study and living costs. The official page states CHF 12,000 per semester plus a tuition-fee waiver for the regular three- or four-semester programme duration. Applicants are expected to rank in approximately the top 10 percent of their bachelor programme. The 2027 application window closes on 30 November 2026.

title: KTH Scholarship
manual_review_requirements: Confirm that the applicant is liable to pay tuition fees in Sweden.
Confirm that an eligible KTH master's programme was ranked as the applicant's first priority.
Confirm admission eligibility for the selected KTH master's programme.
Verify the academic-excellence and programme-specific selection factors.
Confirm that the scholarship application was complete before the official deadline.
eligibility_text: The KTH Scholarship covers the full tuition fee for an eligible KTH master's programme but does not include living costs. Applicants must be fee-paying students and must select an eligible KTH programme as their first priority. Selection considers academic excellence and other programme factors. The 2026 application deadline was 15 January 2026.

title: University of Auckland Doctoral Scholarship
manual_review_requirements: Confirm an eligible offer or place in a University of Auckland doctoral programme.
Confirm the correct domestic or international application round and deadline.
Verify compliance with the doctoral admission and scholarship-ranking requirements.
Confirm full-time doctoral enrolment and the applicable award duration.
Confirm final selection under the competitive scholarship scheme.
eligibility_text: The University of Auckland Doctoral Scholarship is awarded through a competitive scheme with four rounds each year. The 2026 award provides a NZD 35,468 annual stipend, tuition fees for up to 42 months and the compulsory single-student health-insurance charge for eligible international recipients. Applicants must be offered a place in an eligible doctoral programme and meet the relevant round requirements.
